creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sergey from comment #0)

> … Unable to get paskages/Index file from selected media. …

I think, close this as a duplicate of more recent bug 201485. 

(The underlying cause of the bug might have been different in 2013, but the end results are much the same.)

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 201485 ***
